tasks.subject: Task 0: Repo + module skeleton
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Module directory has a valid module.json that Foundry loads, plus a git repo with .gitignore and seed CHANGELOG/README. Foundry shows the module in Manage Modules. No UI yet.

**Files:**
- Create: module.json, README.md, CHANGELOG.md, LICENSE, .gitignore, scripts/shadowdark-enhancer.mjs, languages/en.json, styles/shadowdark-enhancer.css, templates/.gitkeep

**Verify:** mcp__foundry-vtt__evaluate returns { active: true, version: '0.1.0' } and console shows 'shadowdark-enhancer | init'.

```json:metadata
{"files":["module.json","scripts/shadowdark-enhancer.mjs","README.md","CHANGELOG.md","LICENSE",".gitignore","languages/en.json","styles/shadowdark-enhancer.css"],"verifyCommand":"mcp__foundry-vtt__evaluate: return { active: game.modules.get('shadowdark-enhancer')?.active, version: game.modules.get('shadowdark-enhancer')?.version }","acceptanceCriteria":["git repo initialized","Foundry shows Shadowdark Enhancer v0.1.0 in Manage Modules","Console logs 'shadowdark-enhancer | init' on activation","No console errors"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Settings registration
tasks.description:
**Goal:** All five module settings from spec §7.3 + internal crawlState world setting registered at init time, visible under Configure Settings.

**Files:**
- Create: scripts/settings.mjs
- Modify: scripts/shadowdark-enhancer.mjs, languages/en.json

**Verify:** mcp__foundry-vtt__evaluate reading all five settings returns defaults: combatMovementDefault=30, oocMovementBudget=90, oocEnforceBudget=true, hideHiddenNpcCards=true, warnIfCrawlHelperEnabled=true.

```json:metadata
{"files":["scripts/settings.mjs","scripts/shadowdark-enhancer.mjs","languages/en.json"],"verifyCommand":"mcp__foundry-vtt__evaluate read all 5 module settings","acceptanceCriteria":["All 5 settings visible in Configure Settings","All defaults match spec §7.3","Internal crawlState setting registered (config:false)"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: CrawlState singleton + socket sync
tasks.description:
**Goal:** World-settings-backed singleton holds 3-state model, broadcasts mutations via socket, emits sde.stateChanged hook. Mode-transition combat hooks wired.

**Files:**
- Create: scripts/crawl-state.mjs
- Modify: scripts/shadowdark-enhancer.mjs

**Verify:** Probe sequence: off → startCrawl → crawl → nextCrawlTurn → crawl turn=1 → endCrawl → off turn=0.

```json:metadata
{"files":["scripts/crawl-state.mjs","scripts/shadowdark-enhancer.mjs"],"verifyCommand":"mcp__foundry-vtt__evaluate sequence: startCrawl, nextCrawlTurn, endCrawl with state assertions","acceptanceCriteria":["mode getter starts at 'off'","startCrawl/endCrawl/nextCrawlTurn mutate correctly","combatStart sets mode=combat, deleteCombat restores prior mode","sde.stateChanged hook fires on every mutation","State syncs to second client via socket"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Strip mount + empty header + bounds tracking
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Header-only Crawl Strip mounts at top of screen for GMs. Bounds-tracks sidebar/scene-nav. Players see nothing while mode=off.

**Files:**
- Create: scripts/crawl-strip.mjs, templates/crawl-strip.hbs
- Modify: styles/shadowdark-enhancer.css, scripts/shadowdark-enhancer.mjs

**Verify:** Strip element mounted; bounds rect sane; visual screenshot showing 'Start Crawl' button (GM).

```json:metadata
{"files":["scripts/crawl-strip.mjs","templates/crawl-strip.hbs","styles/shadowdark-enhancer.css","scripts/shadowdark-enhancer.mjs"],"verifyCommand":"mcp__foundry-vtt__screenshot + DOM rect probe","acceptanceCriteria":["Strip mounts as #shadowdark-enhancer-strip in #interface","Hidden for non-GM in off mode","Header shows mode pill + crawlTurn or round/turn","Sidebar collapse adjusts strip right edge","No listener leaks across re-renders"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Stat panel widgets (HP, Movement, Luck)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Three small ES modules render one card cell each. Shared contract: render(actor, ctx?) → HTML string. Luck reads system.luck + hasLuckToken; click delegates spendLuck action.

**Files:**
- Create: scripts/stat-panels/{hp,movement,luck}-panel.mjs
- Modify: styles/shadowdark-enhancer.css

**Verify:** Probe runs all three render() functions against Druchor (PC) and Acrobat (NPC); validates strings include expected values + classes.

```json:metadata
{"files":["scripts/stat-panels/hp-panel.mjs","scripts/stat-panels/movement-panel.mjs","scripts/stat-panels/luck-panel.mjs","styles/shadowdark-enhancer.css"],"verifyCommand":"mcp__foundry-vtt__evaluate calling each panel.render() with test actors","acceptanceCriteria":["hpPanel adds sde-hp-low when value<=0","movementPanel adds sde-mv-over when used>budget","luckPanel renders pips per remaining/available; — for NPCs","luck pip click attribute data-action='spendLuck'"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Crawl-mode card layout
tasks.description:
**Goal:** While mode=crawl, strip renders one card per Player actor in active scene with HP, Movement (placeholder used=0), Luck, Init. Sorted by oocInitiative desc, else alphabetically.

**Files:**
- Modify: scripts/crawl-strip.mjs, templates/crawl-strip.hbs, styles/shadowdark-enhancer.css

**Verify:** Screenshot + DOM probe: 2 PC cards with portraits, names alphabetical.

```json:metadata
{"files":["scripts/crawl-strip.mjs","templates/crawl-strip.hbs","styles/shadowdark-enhancer.css"],"verifyCommand":"mcp__foundry-vtt__evaluate DOM card count + names","acceptanceCriteria":["One card per scene Player actor","Cards show HP, Mv (0/90), Luck, Init '—'","Sorted alphabetically with no init set","No NPCs render in crawl mode","Re-renders on updateActor / updateToken"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Out-of-combat initiative — roll & reset
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Roll Initiative button rolls 1d20 + bonus (advantage via shadowdark.dice.applyAdvantage) for unrolled PCs; whispers to GM; persists in CrawlState.oocInitiative; cards re-sort. Reset clears.

**Files:**
- Create: scripts/initiative-manager.mjs
- Modify: scripts/crawl-strip.mjs, templates/crawl-strip.hbs, styles/shadowdark-enhancer.css

**Verify:** Probe rollOocForAll → 2 entries with finite rolls; clear → 0 entries.

```json:metadata
{"files":["scripts/initiative-manager.mjs","scripts/crawl-strip.mjs","templates/crawl-strip.hbs","styles/shadowdark-enhancer.css"],"verifyCommand":"mcp__foundry-vtt__evaluate sequence: rollOocForAll, inspect oocInitiative, clearOocInitiative","acceptanceCriteria":["Roll button only rolls unrolled PCs","Uses applyAdvantage when advantage != 0","Whisper-to-GM chat message fires","Cards re-sort by roll descending","Reset clears the map (GM only)"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Combat-mode card layout + hidden-NPC filter
tasks.description:
**Goal:** While mode=combat, strip renders cards in game.combat.turns order, hides combatants where token.hidden || combatant.hidden (gated by hideHiddenNpcCards setting). Active combatant highlighted. Round/turn header live.

**Files:**
- Modify: scripts/crawl-strip.mjs

**Verify:** Create combat programmatically; probe card count + active flag.

```json:metadata
{"files":["scripts/crawl-strip.mjs"],"verifyCommand":"mcp__foundry-vtt__evaluate to create combat + inspect cards + screenshot","acceptanceCriteria":["Cards from game.combat.turns in order","Hidden combatants excluded when setting is on","Active combatant has .sde-card-active class","Header shows 'Round N • Turn N/M' live"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Hidden-NPC bidirectional sync hooks
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Forked from Vagabond Crawler. Toggling token.hidden syncs to combatant.hidden and vice versa. GM-only. Self-guarded against infinite loops via equality check.

**Files:**
- Create: scripts/hidden-sync.mjs
- Modify: scripts/shadowdark-enhancer.mjs

**Verify:** Probe before/after token.update({hidden: !hidden}) → combatant.hidden matches; then reverse direction.

```json:metadata
{"files":["scripts/hidden-sync.mjs","scripts/shadowdark-enhancer.mjs"],"verifyCommand":"mcp__foundry-vtt__evaluate toggle each side and verify sync within 50ms","acceptanceCriteria":["updateToken with hidden change updates combatant.hidden","updateCombatant with hidden change updates token.hidden","No infinite hook loop (equality guard)","GM-only enforcement"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Movement tracker — combat red-line + turn-start capture
tasks.description:
**Goal:** turnStart flag captured on combatStart and combatTurn for active combatant. usedFor(token, mode) computes grid Chebyshev distance from origin. Strip Mv cell turns red when used>budget.

**Files:**
- Create: scripts/movement-tracker.mjs
- Modify: scripts/shadowdark-enhancer.mjs, scripts/crawl-strip.mjs

**Verify:** Start combat → probe active combatant's turnStart flag matches token position; move token; usedFor returns distance > 0.

```json:metadata
{"files":["scripts/movement-tracker.mjs","scripts/shadowdark-enhancer.mjs","scripts/crawl-strip.mjs"],"verifyCommand":"mcp__foundry-vtt__evaluate inspect turnStart flag + usedFor distance","acceptanceCriteria":["combatStart captures turnStart for all combatants","combatTurn captures turnStart for new active combatant","deleteCombat clears all turnStart flags","usedFor returns Chebyshev distance in feet","Strip Mv cell shows live used/budget; red when over"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: Crawl-anchor capture + OoC budget enforcement
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Next Crawl Turn captures crawlAnchor on every scene token. preUpdateToken refuses moves past budget when oocEnforceBudget=true. Mv cell shows live used/90.

**Files:**
- Modify: scripts/crawl-state.mjs, scripts/movement-tracker.mjs

**Verify:** Probe: start crawl → next crawl turn → attempt 2000-px move on PC → blocked=true. Toggle setting off → move succeeds.

```json:metadata
{"files":["scripts/crawl-state.mjs","scripts/movement-tracker.mjs"],"verifyCommand":"mcp__foundry-vtt__evaluate startCrawl + nextCrawlTurn + attempt over-budget move + verify blocked","acceptanceCriteria":["startCrawl + nextCrawlTurn capture crawlAnchor flags","endCrawl clears crawlAnchor flags","preUpdateToken refuses moves exceeding budget when setting on","Setting off allows the move; Mv cell turns red"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 11: Luck-spend click + Combat HUD dropdown
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Clicking a filled luck pip on a PC card calls actor.system.useLuckToken(). Active combatant card has HUD trigger that opens dropdown with Status/Actions/Movement tabs.

**Files:**
- Create: scripts/npc-action-menu.mjs, templates/npc-action-menu.hbs
- Modify: scripts/crawl-strip.mjs, styles/shadowdark-enhancer.css

**Verify:** Set luck remaining=2 → click pip → probe luck.remaining → confirm decrement. Open HUD → click Rollback → token returns to turn-start coords.

```json:metadata
{"files":["scripts/npc-action-menu.mjs","templates/npc-action-menu.hbs","scripts/crawl-strip.mjs","styles/shadowdark-enhancer.css"],"verifyCommand":"mcp__foundry-vtt__evaluate luck before/after click + HUD open/close + rollback","acceptanceCriteria":["Click pip calls useLuckToken(); remaining decrements correctly","Active card shows '▼ HUD ▼' trigger","Dropdown opens beneath card; tabs switch on click","Status tab: HP +/− buttons work; spend luck gated by hasLuckToken","Actions tab: Open Sheet works","Movement tab: Rollback moves token back to turnStart","Dropdown closes on outside click and on combatTurn"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 12: Coexistence warning for shadowdark-crawl-helper
tasks.description:
**Goal:** At ready, if shadowdark-crawl-helper is active AND warnIfCrawlHelperEnabled is true, show a ui.notifications.warn message.

**Files:**
- Modify: scripts/shadowdark-enhancer.mjs, languages/en.json

**Verify:** Enable Crawl Helper → reload → see yellow warning. Disable setting → reload → no warning.

```json:metadata
{"files":["scripts/shadowdark-enhancer.mjs","languages/en.json"],"verifyCommand":"manual: enable Crawl Helper module, reload, observe notification","acceptanceCriteria":["Warning shows when Crawl Helper active + setting on","No warning when setting off","No warning when Crawl Helper inactive"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 13: CSS polish + Shadowdark palette
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace placeholder palette with parchment/iron/torch tones. Verify ruler color works under Foundry v14; defer if API parity issue. Polish hover, spacing, card wrap.

**Files:**
- Modify: styles/shadowdark-enhancer.css
- (Conditional) scripts/movement-tracker.mjs

**Verify:** Visual screenshots in crawl mode (4 PCs) and combat mode (6 combatants, one hidden); compare to spec §6.1/§6.2 mockups.

```json:metadata
{"files":["styles/shadowdark-enhancer.css","scripts/movement-tracker.mjs","README.md"],"verifyCommand":"mcp__foundry-vtt__screenshot in both modes","acceptanceCriteria":["Palette uses warm parchment/torch tones","Active combatant has amber glow","All buttons have hover states","Cards wrap to second row beyond ~6","Ruler color works OR documented as follow-up"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 14: README + version bump + manual UAT pass
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Finalize README for v0.1.0; move CHANGELOG Unreleased → 0.1.0 dated entry; run full spec §11 UAT checklist; tag v0.1.0.

**Files:**
- Modify: README.md, CHANGELOG.md
- Tag: v0.1.0

**Verify:** Spec §11 checklist walk-through; each item ✓ or recorded as known-issue.

```json:metadata
{"files":["README.md","CHANGELOG.md"],"verifyCommand":"manual UAT walkthrough of spec §11 in running world","acceptanceCriteria":["README covers install/requirements/features/settings/known issues","CHANGELOG dated v0.1.0 entry","All spec §11 UAT items pass or recorded as known issue","git tag v0.1.0 created"]}
```
